chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1252 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4927/25 3.For hearing of main case. 03-09-2025 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Bandhani, Advocate for the petitioner. **** After arguing the matter at some length, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will approach the proper forum/Court, available under the law. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
